case_title: DEMOCRAT PRINTING AND LITHOGRAPHY COMPANY, VS. JOSEPH CONNELLY et al

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER DEMOCRAT PRINTING AND LITHOGRAPHY COMPANY'S FIRST AMEDNED PETITION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR FOR LACK OF SHOWING THAT THE COURT HAS JURISDICTION BECAUSE OF THE 1. THE STATUS OF THE BANKRUPTCY PROCEEDING FILED BY JOSEPH CONNELLY AND 2. THE EFFECT OF THE BANKRUPTCY FILING ON THIS PENDING MATTER AND ON THE CASE OF CONNELLY V. HOLLAND (CASE CGC-12-523731). calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On First Amedned Petition For Order Compelling Arb
Off Calendar Dec-31-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. HOLDEN W. STEIN OF THE STEIN LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 321-7190 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. ANDREW P. HOLLAND OF THE LAW FIRM OF THOITS, LOVE & MCLEAN, TEL. NO. (650)327-4200 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENTS BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER DEMOCRAT PRINTING AND LITHOGRAPHY COMPANY'S First Amedned Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR FOR LACK OF SHOWING THAT THE COURT HAS JURISDICTION BECAUSE OF THE 1. the status of the bankruptcy proceeding filed by Joseph Connelly and 2. the effect of the bankruptcy filing on this pending matter and on the case of Connelly v. Holland (Case CGC-12-523731). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER DEMOCRAT PRINTING AND LITHOGRAPHY COMPANY's Motion For Leave To Amend Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

Ntc Of Hrg On Petition For Order Compelling Arb
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Holden W. Stein, Esq. of Stein Law Group, Tel. 415.321.7190, for petitioner and moving party;
Eric H. Milliken, Esq. of EHM Legal, Tel. 415.341.2888, for respondents and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. After hearing, the court ruled as follows: PETITIONER DEMOCRAT PRINTING AND LITHOGRAPHY COMPANY's Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration is granted. Plaintiff can bring more than one arbitration proceeding. Request for costs is denied. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
